summary: [seed] Algedonic channel online — VSM Option C shipped
details:
## What

First signal in the new algedonic inbox. Confirms the round-trip from PowerShell emit -> JSONL append -> dashboard read works end-to-end.

## What to do

Click **Ack** to dismiss. This is a seed signal, no action required.

## See also

- `docs/contracts/2026-05-24-algedonic-channel.contract.md`
- `Scripts/algedonic-emit.ps1`
- `.github/workflows/ecosystem-health.yml`

summary: [poll] GuitarAlchemist/tars HEAD unreachable for 2 consecutive polls (HTTP 429)
details:
## What

The ecosystem-health poller could not reach the GitHub API for **GuitarAlchemist/tars** for 2 consecutive runs.

## Symptom

```
GET https://api.github.com/repos/GuitarAlchemist/tars/commits/HEAD
HTTP 429
```

## What to check

- GitHub status page (https://www.githubstatus.com/)
- The sibling repo may have been renamed/transferred
- Token scope (the workflow uses GITHUB_TOKEN with cross-repo read access)

summary: [total outage] All 4 sibling repos unreachable
details:
## What

Every sibling-repo HEAD probe in this run failed. This is almost certainly a GA-side network / token issue rather than every sibling going down simultaneously.

## What to check

1. https://www.githubstatus.com/
2. Token scope on `secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN` (should be a workflow token with cross-repo read)
3. Recent GitHub Actions runner outages
